diagram_title: C Root Daemon Splice Proxy — C4 Component Diagram (Post-Hardening Target)

systems.name: OpenCode Daemonization Runtime
systems.description: Privileged gateway plus per-user backend runtime for web and TUI access.

containers.name: C Root Gateway
containers.description: Root-privileged C daemon handling auth, routing, and splice proxying on TCP :1080.
containers.technology: C / epoll / splice / pthread / PAM / OpenSSL

containers.name: Per-User Daemon
containers.description: Per-user opencode backend serving HTTP, SSE, and WebSocket over Unix socket.

containers.name: Filesystem State
containers.description: Discovery files, PID files, JWT secret, runtime paths.

components.name: Connection Acceptor
components.description: Non-blocking accept, allocates PendingRequest, registers to epoll. Never blocks event loop.

components.name: HTTP Request Accumulator
components.description: Per-connection read buffer state machine. Accumulates TCP segments until complete HTTP header.

components.name: Auth Handler
components.description: Rate limiter + thread-per-auth PAM. Runs PAM in pthread, signals main loop via eventfd.

components.name: JWT Engine
components.description: HMAC-SHA256 sign/verify with file-backed persistent secret. Validates sub + exp claims.

components.name: Identity Router
components.description: Maps verified JWT sub → getpwnam → uid → find_or_create_daemon. No first-available fallback.

components.name: Daemon Lifecycle Manager
components.description: Discovery-first adopt, fork+setuid+execvp spawn, readiness poll, stale cleanup, runtime path detection.
components.technology: fork / setuid / execvp / Unix socket probe

components.name: Splice Proxy
components.description: Zero-copy bidirectional forwarding. Tagged EpollCtx per fd for directional splice. Proper lifecycle cleanup.

components.name: Connection Lifecycle Manager
components.description: EPOLL_CTL_DEL before close, g_nconns tracking, closed flag for in-flight event guard.

components.name: Per-User Opencode Backend
components.description: Full opencode server running as target user. Serves HTTP/SSE/WebSocket over Unix socket.

components.name: Discovery and Runtime Files
components.description: daemon.json (socket path, PID), daemon.pid (guard), jwt.key (persistent secret), runtime dir.

relationships.description: Hands off accepted fd with PendingRequest to accumulator.
Complete login request triggers auth handler.
Complete request with JWT cookie triggers verification.
Auth success → JWT Engine signs token with file-backed secret.
Verified identity (username + uid) passed to router.
Router invokes lifecycle manager to ensure daemon ready.
Reads/writes discovery file, checks PID, detects runtime path.
Spawns or adopts per-user daemon process.
Provides ready daemon socket for splice proxy setup.
Proxies HTTP/SSE/WebSocket traffic to per-user backend.
Termination events trigger connection lifecycle cleanup.
Reads JWT secret file on startup.
